items.text: This document demonstrates **canonical** assistant knowledge: front matter matches `brain/SCHEMAS/knowledge-document.schema.json`, body is plain Markdown for human readers and chunking.

items.text: - `retrievalProfile`: string (e.g. `assistant-default`) from `MANIFEST.yaml` surfaces. - `docIds` / chunk filters: optional; must respect `visibility` and `status` (default: `canonical` only in production).

[summary] Sample canonical knowledge topic
This document demonstrates **canonical** assistant knowledge: front matter matches `brain/SCHEMAS/knowledge-document.schema.json`, body is plain Markdown for human readers and chunking.

---

[summary] sample module.manifest
{ "moduleId": "hz.module.assistant.sample", "version": "0.1.0", "entry": "assistant-sample", "brainPaths": [ "apps/assistant/canonical/*.md", "prompts/library/assistant-system-baseline.md" ], "requiredApps": ["assistant"], "retrievalScopes"

---

[summary] Retrieval contract
- `retrievalProfile`: string (e.g. `assistant-default`) from `MANIFEST.yaml` surfaces. - `docIds` / chunk filters: optional; must respect `visibility` and `status` (default: `canonical` only in production).

---

[summary] Launcher surface overview
The **launcher** surface provides window chrome, session bootstrap, and help text that applies before any app-specific knowledge loads.

---

[summary] Retrieving NLM bibliographic records from the LocatorPlus Catalog via Z39.50  · NLM Customer Support Center
